# Ankit Vaghani — Senior Python & Backend Engineer

> Personal portfolio: production backends, AI/LLM systems, microservices, and AWS cloud infrastructure. Top Rated Upwork freelancer with 8+ years experience.

Canonical URL: https://vaghaniankit.github.io/
Resume (PDF): https://vaghaniankit.github.io/assets/resume/ankit-vaghani-resume.pdf
Book a call: https://cal.com/sparkscribe-technologies
Company: https://sparkscribetech.com

## Summary

Ankit Vaghani is a Senior Python Developer and Backend Engineer based in Surat, Gujarat, India (IST, overlap with US & EU hours). He builds APIs, microservices, async pipelines, and AI-powered backends with full ownership from architecture to production deployment.

- 8+ years in production systems (professional roles from Jan 2018)
- 100% Upwork Job Success Score, Top Rated, 12+ completed projects
- 0–4 hour average response time on Upwork
- Phone: +91 7573077372

## Experience (from resume)

- **2022–Present** — Founder & CTO, SparkScribe Technologies
- **Sep 2024–Dec 2025** — Senior Team Lead, Keuro Life LLP (Astrosure.ai, Riyaah)
- **Sep 2022–Aug 2024** — Senior Team Leader, Flooid LLP (HerKey / JobsForHer)
- **Aug 2021–Sep 2022** — Sr. Python Developer (Consultant), Capgemini (ANZ Banking)
- **Apr 2020–Jul 2021** — Sr. Python Developer, BrickSteel Enterprises Infotech
- **Jan 2018–Dec 2019** — Python Django Developer, Codetrinity IT Services

## Education

- M.Sc. Information & Communication Technology (2016–2018), VNSGU, Surat
- B.C.A. (2013–2016), VNSGU, Surat

## Tech stack (aligned with SparkScribe Technologies)

- **Backend (11):** Python, Django, Flask, FastAPI, Celery, Gunicorn, Django REST Framework, WebSockets, REST API, GraphQL, Microservices
- **Frontend (12):** HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, HTMX, jQuery, React, Angular, Vue.js, TypeScript, Alpine.js
- **AI / ML (14):** OpenAI, LangChain, Hugging Face, RAG Pipelines, Claude API, Google Gemini, AI Agents, Vector Databases, scikit-learn, Pandas, NumPy, Selenium, BeautifulSoup, Scrapy
- **Database (10):** PostgreSQL, MySQL, SQLite, MongoDB, Firebase, Redis, Elasticsearch, Neo4j, Amazon DynamoDB, pgvector
- **DevOps (14):** Linux, Docker, Nginx, AWS, DigitalOcean, GitHub Actions, RabbitMQ, Kubernetes, Terraform, Jenkins, GitLab CI, AWS Lambda, Prometheus, Grafana
